issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling for missing hping3 or permission failures.
The skill contains extensive explanatory text that may be considered padded.
The skill is limited to Linux environments and does not support other operating systems.

scenarios.name: Verify firewall rule allows TCP/5432 from app tier to db host
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses hping3 -S -p 5432 with SA/RA/no-reply interpretation as documented; baseline mostly suggested nc/nmap and only loosely matched the rubric.

scenarios.name: Measure real TCP RTT to api.example.com on port 443 when ping shows steady but app reports latency spikes
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applied the documented hping3 -S -p 443 -c 200 -i u100000 pattern plus --traceroute -S to locate the slow hop; baseline relied on generic curl/ping timing without TCP-port-targeted probes.
